# Just Imagine Ltd

> Gas Safe registered heating, boiler and plumbing specialists serving Rugby, Warwickshire and Coventry. Boiler installation, repair, servicing, CP12 landlord gas safety certificates, central heating, power flushing, plumbing and 24/7 emergency callouts.

- Phone: 07774 079152
- Email: justimagineheating@gmail.com
- Coverage: Rugby (CV21–23), Leamington Spa (CV31–33), Warwick (CV34–35), Kenilworth (CV8), Stratford-upon-Avon (CV37), Coventry (CV1–6), Nuneaton (CV10–11), Bedworth (CV12), Southam (CV47), Atherstone (CV9), Alcester (B49), Shipston-on-Stour (CV36).

## Services
- [Boiler Installation](https://justimagine.ltd/services/boiler-installation): Combi, system & regular boilers — Worcester, Vaillant, Ideal — fixed-price, up to 12-yr warranty.
- [Boiler Repair](https://justimagine.ltd/services/boiler-repair): Same-day diagnostic & repair on all major brands.
- [Boiler Service](https://justimagine.ltd/services/boiler-servicing): Annual manufacturer-spec service from £75.
- [Gas Safety Certificate (CP12)](https://justimagine.ltd/services/gas-safety-certificate): Same-day issue from £60.
- [Landlord Packages](https://justimagine.ltd/services/landlord-gas-safety): CP12 + service + priority cover for portfolios.
- [Central Heating](https://justimagine.ltd/services/central-heating): Radiators, smart controls, system upgrades.
- [Plumbing](https://justimagine.ltd/services/plumbing): Leaks, taps, cylinders, bathroom & kitchen.
- [Power Flushing](https://justimagine.ltd/services/power-flushing): From £395, restores heat output.
- [24/7 Emergency](https://justimagine.ltd/services/emergency-callout): Round-the-clock response.
